inventory.archiveProductMessage:
This product has transaction history ({{summary}}) and will be archived instead of permanently deleted.

Archived products are hidden from normal views but preserved for reporting. Continue?

inventory.productArchivedSuccess: Product archived successfully. It has been hidden from the product list but remains in your records.
